headline: Jim Cramer on Ventas: “I Think This Is Just a Fantastic Business”
summary: Ventas, Inc. (NYSE:VTR) was among the stocks on Jim Cramer’s Mad Money radar as he discussed the recent sell-off in AI-related stocks. headline: Alexandria Real Estate: Decade Low, Deep-Value Play Or Value Trap - I Say Both
summary: Alexandria Real Estate Equities faces persistent headwinds, with Q1 earnings revealing an FFO decline and dropping occupancy. Learn why ARE stock is a hold.
